document.title: ZJCZ.E88265 - Flexible Cord
document.documentType: UL Online Certifications Directory certification listing

sourceSummary.oneLine: UL Online Certifications Directory listing ZJCZ.E88265 identifies I SHENG ELECTRIC WIRE & CABLE CO LTD flexible cord types.
sourceSummary.officialUse: Use as a UL certification directory record for identifying listed flexible cord categories and types; only products bearing the UL Mark should be considered Certified and covered under UL's Follow-Up Service.
keyPoints: Company listed: I SHENG ELECTRIC WIRE & CABLE CO LTD, file E88265.
Category: Flexible Cord, with listed clock, decorative, dryer and range, heater, jacketed, and parallel cord types.
UL disclaimer states appearance in the database alone does not assure manufacture under UL's Follow-Up Service.
